items.title: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
items.content:
AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

Language: Python
Stars: 8627
Forks: 1100
items.contentSnippet:
AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
Language: Python
Stars: 8627
Forks: 1100
items.creator: xbtlin

summaries.zh: 本文介绍了基于Claude Code/Codex的AI时代伯克希尔价值投资研究框架，融合巴菲特、芒格、段永平、李录四大师方法论，采用多Agent并行研究。该框架使用Python开发，获得8002星和1013次分叉，旨在提升价值投资研究的效率与深度。
summaries.en: The project "AI-era Berkshire" develops a value investing research framework using Claude Code/Codex in the AI era. It integrates methodologies from Warren Buffett, Charlie Munger, Duan Yongping, and Li Lu, employing multi-agent parallel analysis. The framework is implemented in Python and has garnered 8,002 stars and 1,013 forks on its repository.

items.summary: 本文介绍了基于Claude Code/Codex的AI时代伯克希尔价值投资研究框架，融合巴菲特、芒格、段永平、李录四大师方法论，采用多Agent并行研究。该框架使用Python开发，获得8002星和1013次分叉，旨在提升价值投资研究的效率与深度。

items.title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
items.content:
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

Language: C
Stars: 24615
Forks: 1816
items.contentSnippet:
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
Language: C
Stars: 24615
Forks: 1816
items.creator: DeusData

summaries.zh: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp是一款高性能代码智能MCP服务器，可将代码库索引为持久化知识图谱，平均每个仓库仅需毫秒级索引。支持158种语言，查询速度达亚毫秒级，令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令令
summaries.en: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp is a high-performance code intelligence MCP server that indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph, processing average repositories in milliseconds. It supports 158 languages, offers sub-millisecond queries, and reduces tokens by 99%. The server runs as a single static binary with zero dependencies. It has 4402 stars and 432 forks.

summaries.zh: 《OmniRoute》是一款免费AI网关，支持连接231+服务商（含50+免费），包括Claude Code、Codex等，可对接Claude/GPT/Gemini。采用RTK+Caveman压缩技术，节省15-95% token，具备智能自动切换、MCP/A2A和多模态API等功能。支持桌面版及PWA，使用TypeScript开发，获10025星、1508次分叉。
summaries.en: OmniRoute is a free AI gateway offering a single endpoint to connect over 231 providers, including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, and Copilot, to Claude, GPT, and Gemini. It supports 50+ free services and utilizes RTK+Caveman compression, saving 15-95% tokens. Features include smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, and support for Desktop/PWA. Developed in TypeScript, it has 10,025 stars and 1,508 forks.

summaries.en: The AWS Agent Toolkit for AWS provides official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to assist AI agents in building on AWS. The toolkit is written in Python and has gained significant popularity, with 1,261 stars and 117 forks on its repository. It offers a structured framework for developers to create AI agents tailored for AWS environments, leveraging AWS's extensive capabilities. The toolkit's components, such as servers and plugins, streamline the development process, making it easier to deploy and manage AI solutions on AWS.

items.creator: NanmiCoder

summaries.zh: NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler 是一款基于 Python 的爬虫工具，支持从多个平台抓取数据。主要功能包括：爬取小红书、抖音、快手、B 站、微博、百度贴吧和知乎的评论及帖子。该工具包含评论回复爬虫功能，适用于数据采集需求。项目在 GitHub 上获得 53946 挂星和 11028 挂叉。
summaries.en: NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler is a Python-based tool for web scraping, supporting comment extraction from platforms like Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Kuaishou, Bilibili, Weibo, and Baidu Tieba. It also handles replies in Tieba and extracts comments from知乎. The project has 53,946 stars and 11,028 forks on GitHub.
